'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 50''' is the fiftieth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[January 17]], [[1979]]. Edited by [[Dez Skinn]], the title was revamped as part of his "Marvel Revolution" to more directly appeal to fans of the film by including photo-covers and features in addition to the existing comic strips. 

This issue includes part four of a four-part black & white reprinting of the story ''[[The Keeper's World]]'', originally published in color in [[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]]' ''[[Pizzazz]]'' magazine.

==Contents==
*"[[The Keeper's Secret!]]"
*"[[The Final Fury!]]"
*"Tales of the galaxy: Visitation Part 3: Demonspawn!"
*"The power of Warlock Part 6: Warlock!"
